name: codex-quota-lens
description: Local-first Codex quota dashboard, burn-rate analytics, and usage planning.

interface.shortDescription: Track Codex quota, burn rate, and usage plans locally.
interface.longDescription: Read numeric quota and token telemetry from local Codex sessions, identify the fastest usage periods, estimate depletion risk, and open a private local dashboard without uploading conversation content.
defaultPrompt: 查看我当前的 Codex 剩余额度、使用速度和重置时间。
分析我什么时候使用 Codex 额度最快。
根据模型、推理强度和任务数量规划我的 Codex 额度。
